SEARCH
Package com.comp2042.service.session

Interface GameSession

All Superinterfaces:
GameStateContext
All Known Implementing Classes:
SinglePlayerGameSession
public interface GameSession extends GameStateContext
Service interface abstracting a playable game session (Service Layer Pattern). Encapsulates board/state management, allowing controllers to focus on UI interactions. Extends GameStateContext for state transition management.
Author:
Dong, Jia.
